message:
fix(runtime,repl,command): fix ACL gating, PSYNC boundary, Lua hash migration, clippy

- Fix LuaTable hash→string_hash/other_hash field migration in lua_eval.rs:
  add hash_pairs() and hash_is_empty() helpers, update next(), table.maxn,
  and cjson.encode to use the new split hash fields
- Fix ACL gating: deleted users on existing sessions retain access (Redis behavior)
  instead of getting NOPERM — fixes 20 conformance test failures
- Fix BacklogWindow::contains to use inclusive end bound (<=) for PSYNC
  partial resync at exact backlog end offset — fixes conformance test
- Fix clippy warnings across workspace: collapsible if/match in fr-runtime
  and fr-server, enum variant name prefix, useless vec!, explicit auto-deref
- Run cargo fmt across entire workspace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
